label: Command Palette (cmd+k)
summary: Cmd/Ctrl+K command palette built on the cmdk primitive. Ships a dialog wrapper that traps focus, restores it on close, registers the global shortcut, and groups items by section. The codegen LLM populates the items array with project-specific actions (navigate to page, run command, switch theme) — the wrapper owns keyboard handling, fuzzy matching, and accessibility so that surface stays consistent across projects.
